use_cases: Display user profile pictures in navigation headers and dropdown menus
Show user avatars in comment sections and discussion threads
Display participant avatars in team member lists and cards
Show profile images in user cards and account settings interfaces
Display author avatars in article metadata and blog posts
ai_summary: A Radix UI-based Avatar component that displays user profile images with automatic fallback to initials when no image is available. Built as a minimal, accessible primitive that supports circular styling and integrates seamlessly into various UI contexts like cards, headers, comments, and team member displays across SaaS and content platforms.
